name: SB 53 Frontier Scope
outcome: Single-step obligation router for the California SB 53 Transparency in Frontier Artificial Intelligence Act (eff. 2026-01-01). Kept as its own composer rather than folded into the CAIA/TRAIGA/AB2013 chains -- SB 53 serves a narrow frontier-lab audience, distinct from the general deployer/developer compliance-owner persona of the other state-AI chains.
